name: Alex Chen
content: RepoHub saved me hours of dataset curation. The search and filtering capabilities are exactly what I needed for training my code models.

name: Sarah Johnson
content: The analytics dashboard gives me incredible visibility into how my repositories are being used. A must-have tool for any open source project.

name: Marcus Williams
content: I use RepoHub daily to find training data for fine-tuning LLMs. The dataset quality and organization is outstanding.
